name: Lucky Four-Leaf Clover
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: a single large four-leaf clover with a cheerful smiling face, four heart-shaped leaves, a curling stem, and a few tiny sparkle marks around it to show it is lucky

name: Friendly Leprechaun
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: a cheerful leprechaun standing and waving, a tall buckled hat with a shamrock tucked in the band, a curly beard, a buttoned coat, a bow tie, and little buckled shoes, a big friendly grin

name: Pot of Gold
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: a round cauldron-style pot overflowing with shiny round gold coins, a few coins spilling onto the ground beside it, two small clover sprigs at its base, the pot tipped slightly forward to show the treasure

name: Rainbow and Pot of Gold
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: a big arching rainbow with fluffy clouds at each end, a pot brimming with gold coins resting at the bottom of the rainbow, a few stars and a smiling sun peeking from one corner

name: Shamrock Trio
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: three plump three-leaf shamrocks of slightly different sizes arranged together with curling stems, simple bold shapes with plenty of open space, gentle leaf veins, a couple of small dots around them

name: Cute Baby Leprechaun
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: an adorable chibi baby leprechaun with a big round head, oversized buckled hat, chubby cheeks, tiny waving hand, and a single shamrock held in the other hand, very simple rounded shapes for little hands

name: Lucky Horseshoe
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: an upward-facing lucky horseshoe with bold nail holes around its edge, a shamrock resting in the curve and a ribbon bow tied at the top, a few sparkle marks to show good fortune

name: Leprechaun Hat Close-Up
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: a large detailed leprechaun top hat shown up close, a wide brim, a thick band with a square buckle, a single four-leaf clover tucked into the band, gentle creases in the felt

name: Happy St. Patrick's Day Banner
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: playful bubble lettering reading Happy St Patrick's Day arranged on a curved banner, small shamrocks and a tiny pot of gold decorating the corners, a cheerful festive arrangement

name: Dancing Leprechaun with Coins
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: a joyful leprechaun mid-dance with one leg kicked up and arms out, gold coins tossed in the air around him, a buckled hat tilted on his head, motion lines and a few floating shamrocks

name: Shamrock Wreath
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: a round wreath made of overlapping shamrocks and clover leaves, a bow ribbon tied at the bottom, a few tiny gold coins and curling tendrils woven through the ring, an open center

name: Leprechaun Catching a Coin
subject: holidays/st-patrick
prompt: a leprechaun crouched beside his pot of gold reaching out to catch a single coin tumbling toward him, a rainbow arcing overhead, scattered clovers on the ground and an excited expression
